mapper.sql: userId, password, userName, userSex, userImg, delTag
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND delTag = 1

SELECT
FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND delTag = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (userId, password, userName, userSex, userImg, delTag) VALUES (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userSex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NULL, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET userName = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userSex = #{userSex,jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE userId = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND delTag = 1
